insilico.note: SpliceAI moderate (below 0.5 threshold); ambiguous splice impact

literature.title: Functional characterization of BRCA2 c.7976+5G>A using minigene splice reporter assays.
literature.abstract: Minigene assays for BRCA2 c.7976+5G>A show variable splicing outcomes; the variant is currently considered likely benign after consideration of population frequency and inconclusive functional data.

_ground_truth.note: Reclassified from VUS to LB after 2020 reanalysis
